faqs.question: How long does it take to create a website in Algeria?
faqs.answer: A showcase website takes 2-4 weeks. An e-commerce site takes 4-8 weeks. A custom web application takes 2-4 months depending on complexity.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept CIB card, EDAHABIA, bank transfer, and cash. Payment is typically in 3 installments: 30% upfront, 40% mid-project, 30% on delivery.

faqs.question: Is hosting included?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 1 year of hosting included with every website. We use reliable servers with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

faqs.question: Can I update my site myself?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide an intuitive admin interface and training. You can update content, add products, and manage your site independently.

faqs.question: Do you provide maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance packages including updates, backups, security, and technical support.

faqs.question: Is the site optimized for Google?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! All our sites are SEO optimized with proper structure, meta tags, sitemap, and fast loading for best Google ranking.

faqs.question: How long to see SEO results in Algeria?
faqs.answer: First SEO results typically appear between 3 and 6 months. For very competitive keywords, expect 6 to 12 months. Local SEO in Algeria can give faster results as competition is less intense than in Europe.

faqs.question: What budget for SEO in Algeria?
faqs.answer: A complete SEO audit costs between 15,000 and 30,000 DA. For monthly support, expect 25,000 to 60,000 DA/month depending on project scope. It's a worthwhile investment as SEO generates free traffic long-term.

faqs.question: SEO or Google Ads: which to choose?
faqs.answer: SEO is ideal for long-term with high ROI once positioned. Google Ads gives immediate results but is expensive to maintain. The ideal strategy combines both: Ads to start, SEO for sustainability.

faqs.question: How to optimize my site for local SEO in Algeria?
faqs.answer: Create an optimized Google My Business listing, add your contact details on every page, use geolocated keywords (Algiers, Oran, Constantine...), get local backlinks, and collect customer reviews.

faqs.question: Is Arabic content important for SEO?
faqs.answer: Yes! Over 40% of searches in Algeria are in Arabic (darija or standard Arabic). A bilingual French/Arabic site reaches a wider audience and improves your ranking for these queries.

faqs.question: How can Symloop improve my ranking?
faqs.answer: We offer a complete SEO audit, technical optimization of your site, optimized content creation, local backlink strategy, and monthly follow-up with detailed reports. Our experts know the Algerian market.

cta.title: Ready to Dominate Google in Algeria?
cta.subtitle: Our SEO experts analyze your site and propose a personalized strategy to reach the first page.

faqs.question: What's the minimum budget to launch a tech startup in Algeria?
faqs.answer: With Symloop, you can start with a functional MVP from 60,000 DA. This budget includes development of a core feature, basic design and 1 month support. For a more complete application with web and mobile, expect between 120,000 and 200,000 DA.

faqs.question: How long to develop an MVP?
faqs.answer: A simple MVP can be developed in 4 to 6 weeks. For a more complex application with multiple features, expect 2 to 3 months. We work in agile methodology with regular deliveries so you can test quickly.

faqs.question: Why choose a single provider for my startup?
faqs.answer: A single provider simplifies communication, guarantees technical consistency, eliminates coordination problems between providers, and gives you one person responsible for your project's success. It's more efficient and often cheaper.

faqs.question: What technologies do you use for startups?
faqs.answer: We use modern and proven technologies: React/Next.js for web, React Native for cross-platform mobile, Node.js or Python for backend, PostgreSQL or MongoDB for databases, and AWS/Vercel for cloud hosting.

faqs.question: Do you offer support after launch?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our packages include a support period. We also offer monthly maintenance contracts to ensure stability, security updates, and product evolutions.

faqs.question: How does payment work for startups?
faqs.answer: We understand startup constraints. Payment is typically in 3 installments: 30% at start, 40% mid-project, and 30% on delivery. We accept CIB, EDAHABIA, bank transfer and cash payments.

faqs.question: What is a tech partner for a startup?
faqs.answer: A tech partner is an agency or team that handles all technical development for your startup: web/mobile development, cloud infrastructure, design, and support. It's like having a CTO and technical team without permanent hiring costs.

faqs.question: How much does a tech partnership cost for my startup?
faqs.answer: Our partnerships start from 50,000 DA/month for CTO as a Service support. For complete development (MVP), expect between 60,000 and 150,000 DA. Rates depend on complexity and scope of services desired.

faqs.question: Who owns the intellectual property of the code?
faqs.answer: You are 100% owner of the source code and all intellectual property developed. We transfer all rights to you on delivery. You can take the code and have it evolved by another team if you wish.

faqs.question: How does day-to-day collaboration work?
faqs.answer: We work in agile methodology with 2-week sprints. You have access to a dedicated Slack/WhatsApp channel, regular demos, and weekly calls. Your product owner is involved at every step to validate developments.

faqs.question: Can you help with fundraising?
faqs.answer: Yes, we help our partner startups prepare the technical part of their pitch: product demo, technical documentation, roadmap, architecture, and answers to investors' technical questions.

faqs.question: What happens after launch?
faqs.answer: We offer ongoing maintenance and support contracts. Your product evolves with your users: new features, optimizations, bug fixes, security updates. We can also help you recruit your own tech team when you're ready.

cta.subtitle: Free consultation to discuss your startup project and discover how we can help you succeed.
